calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Philip Smith, Esq. of FISHER PHILLIPS LLP, T:415.490.9027, for defendants/moving party;
William F. Fitzgerald, Esq. of FITZGERALD LAW OFFICES, T:415.722.0673, for plaintiff/ opposing party;
Norman La Force, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF NORMAN LA FORCE, T:510.295.7657, for plaintiff/ opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiffs contested and argued the Court's tentative ruling. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTs CONG LI, YUCHEN SUN, RAINBERRY, INC.'s (DBA TRON FOUNDATION) Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action as follows:

Defendants Rainberry, Inc., Justin Sun, and Gong Li's motion to compel arbitration and to stay the action is granted.

[See word minutes for the Court's full ruling.]

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
